summary: Successfully implemented the pluggy plugin management framework from scratch. All 126 tests pass. Key features include: hook specifications/implementations with markers, wrapper and hookwrapper support, historic hooks, plugin registration/unregistration, entry point loading, hook call tracing/monitoring, and proper exception/warning handling.
